title: Docstring hygiene in tools
description: Add missing Sphinx-style docstrings for public functions in tools modules without changing behavior. Keep scope limited to documentation/readability.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added Sphinx-style docstrings for public functions in tools/benchmark_index.py (create_issue, generate_issues, run_benchmark). No behavior changes.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Public functions in tools modules have Sphinx-style docstrings; no behavior changes.
